name: io.github.circularroute/plugin
description: Circulara Observe MCP plugin - meters your AI agents' token spend and carbon, free tier.

environmentVariables.name: CIRCULARA_BACKEND_URL
environmentVariables.description: Your Circulara Observe backend URL - copy from the Connect page after signing in at https://plugin.circulara.ai

environmentVariables.name: CIRCULARA_TENANT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Your workspace ID - from the Connect page

environmentVariables.name: CIRCULARA_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Your signed workspace token - from the Connect page (keep secret)

environmentVariables.name: CIRCULARA_SEAT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Your seat ID - from the Connect page

environmentVariables.name: CIRCULARA_USER_ID
environmentVariables.description: Your email / identity - from the Connect page
